MLPPF.evidence: The new Material Ledger Document tables MLDOC and MLDOCCCS replace most former periodic tables

S076.action: PP SOP is intended as a bridge or interim solution in S/4HANA, which allows you a stepwise system conversion from SAP ERP to SAP S/4HANA on-premise edition and SAP IBP. PP SOP is part of the S/4HANA compatibility pack.
